reasoning: While the composite fidelity (0.88) and programmatic recall (0.96) suggest a high-quality conversion, the specific omissions of sub-bullet questions on Page 5 and subsection headings on Page 1 constitute loss of meeting content. The low structural score (0.68) reflects a significant breakdown in heading hierarchy and list formatting that impacts accessibility and navigation, necessitating human review.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: The output contains several significant omissions. Specifically, it omits two subsection headings on Page 1 ('a. 911/NG911 in the Media' and 'b. AddressNC and Census Geospatial Data'). It also omits a critical source URL on Page 3 and three distinct sub-bullet questions regarding source data on Page 5. These omissions represent substantial losses of information and structural markers.

2. '(http://www.ncgicc.org/Portals/3/documents/Location_of_County_GIS_Operations.pdf)' (Page 3 URL)
3. 'o Is current satellite imagery... o Would color infrared imagery... o Would National Agriculture Imagery Program...' (Page 5 sub-bullets)

concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy is significantly broken and inconsistent. Additionally, section headings '3.a. 911/NG911 in the Media' and '3.b. AddressNC and Census Geospatial Data' from page 1 are entirely missing from the output, which disrupts document navigation.
